topic: r4 Instance Type Family Deprecation Details

  entities:

    r4 family|Product
    Neptune|Service
    Engine version 1.1.0.0|Software

  proposition: [The `r4` family is a family of instance types.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r4 family|TYPE|instance type family

  proposition: [The `r4` family is deprecated.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r4 family|STATUS|deprecated

  proposition: [The `r4` family was offered when Neptune was launched in 2018.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    r4 family|OFFERED_BY|Neptune

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune|LAUNCH_YEAR|2018

  proposition: [Newer instance types offer much better price/performance than the `r4` family.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r4 family|PRICE_PERFORMANCE|inferior to newer instance types

  proposition: [As of engine version 1.1.0.0, Neptune no longer supports `r4` instance types.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune|DEPRECATES|r4 family
    Neptune|USES|Engine version 1.1.0.0

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [Engine version 1.1.0.0 is a Neptune engine version.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Engine version 1.1.0.0|VERSION_OF|Neptune

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [Engine version 1.1.0.0 is documented at https://docs.aws.amazon.com/neptune/latest/userguide/engine-releases-1.1.0.0.html.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Engine version 1.1.0.0|DOCUMENTATION_URL|https://docs.aws.amazon.com/neptune/latest/userguide/engine-releases-1.1.0.0.html
